children.heading: .—Applicability
children.label: a .—Applicability
children.text: This chapter does not apply to the Coast Guard or the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

children.label: A
children.text: Purchases in an amount not in excess of the amount of the simplified acquisition threshold.
The term “qualifying proposal” means a proposal that contains sufficient information to enable the Department of Defense to conduct a meaningful audit of the information contained in the proposal.
